title: `podman system df --verbose` crashes
body:
### Issue Description

Runing `podman system df --verbose` crashes with `Error: template: df:1:30: executing "df" at <.Image>: error calling Image: runtime error: slice bounds out of range [:12] with length 0`

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Have a podman system with containers

Run: `podman system df --verbose`

### Describe the results you received

Images are printed, trying to print the container info crashes

### Describe the results you expected

Prints container infos (and probably more)
